meta.title: Kim Andrè Furevikstrand — Senior Software Engineer
meta.description: Senior TypeScript / Node.js / React engineer. Available for remote and Norway-based roles.

chat.welcome: Hi! I'm Kim's AI assistant. Ask me anything about his experience, projects, or availability.
fallback: I'm not sure I understood that. Try asking about my stack, experience, projects, or availability.
Could you rephrase that? You can ask about my tech skills, work history, or how to get in touch.
Hmm, I didn't catch that. Try asking: 'What's your stack?' or 'Are you available for hire?'

contact.name: Your name
